credibility.method: Conf-weighted delivery rate over testable promises (MET=1, PARTIAL=0.5, MISSED=0; H=1.0,M=0.8,L=0.6). Bands A>=75 B>=60 C>=45 D>=30 E<30.
credibility.headline: Most already-testable promises missed — chiefly slipped project deadlines; the beating full-year cost/profit guidance is still NYT.
